title: athyrium dubium
intro: Athyrium dubium, also known as Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus and is native to Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Athyrium dubium has been used in traditional medicine to promote digestive health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the leaves and stems of the plant.
